metadata.description: Specification-first verified development with ATDD, layered quality gates, and review agents. Language-agnostic — brings its workflow to any stack.

plugins.name: verified-development
plugins.description: Specification-first development workflow with ATDD, layered verification gates, and two-stage review agents. Enforces TDD, mechanical quality gates (lint, test, coverage, security, dead code), and AI-powered code review. Language-agnostic: runs the repo's own verify command and infers test idioms; Go is the bundled toolchain example; /test-audit spans Go, TypeScript, Python, and Java.
